scripts.spacetime:generate: node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action generate --database agentmessenger-dev && spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir webapp/src/module_bindings --module-path spacetimedb
scripts.spacetime:publish:local: node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action publish --server local --database agentmessenger-dev && spacetime publish --module-path spacetimedb --server local
scripts.spacetime:publish: node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action publish --server maincloud --database agentmessenger-dev && spacetime publish --module-path spacetimedb --server maincloud
scripts.spacetime:reset:local: node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action reset --server local --database agentmessenger-dev && spacetime publish --module-path spacetimedb --server local agentmessenger-dev --delete-data=always -y
scripts.spacetime:reset:dev: node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action reset --server maincloud --database agentmessenger-dev && spacetime publish --module-path spacetimedb --server maincloud agentmessenger-dev --delete-data=always -y
scripts.spacetime:reset: node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action reset --server maincloud --database agentmessenger && spacetime publish --module-path spacetimedb --server maincloud agentmessenger --delete-data=always -y
scripts.spacetime:reset:manual:local: spacetime delete agentmessenger-dev --server local -y && node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action reset-manual --server local --database agentmessenger-dev && spacetime publish --module-path spacetimedb --server local agentmessenger-dev -y
scripts.spacetime:reset:manual: spacetime delete agentmessenger-dev --server maincloud -y && node scripts/prepare-spacetime-env.mjs --action reset-manual --server maincloud --database agentmessenger-dev && spacetime publish --module-path spacetimedb --server maincloud agentmessenger-dev -y
